REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT PAUL FRENKIEL, TIFFANY PINTOR DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT IS UNCERTAIN. PLAINTIFF SHALL ALLEGE THE SCOPE OF ENCROACHMENT AND THE STARTING DATE OF THE ENCROACHMENT (SPECIFICALLY BEFORE OR AFTER PLAINTIFF'S HOUSE WAS TORN DOWN). DEMURRER IS OTHERWISE OVERRULED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: VANESSA WU; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT PAUL FRENKIEL, TIFFANY PINTOR MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO THE PRAYER FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE FACTS, NOT CONCLUSIONS, SUPPORTING MALICE, OPPRESSION OR FRAUD. MOTION IS OTHERWISE DENIED. MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-24-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT PAUL FRENKIEL, TIFFANY PINTOR MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is granted as to the prayer for punitive damages with leave to amend to allege facts, not conclusions, supporting malice, oppression or fraud. Motion is otherwise denied.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-24-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT PAUL FRENKIEL, TIFFANY PINTOR DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend as Plaintiff's complaint is uncertain. Plaintiff shall allege the scope of encroachment and the starting date of the encroachment (specifically before or after Plaintiff's house was torn down). Demurrer is otherwise overruled.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)
